title: Color Switch (tap to restore color)
narration_transcript: Lock focus on a drink and start filming. Now walk around, pass by and tap on the drink. Then walk away. Open this clip in the edits app. Go to the sequence where you tap on the drink. Click on split and select the first part of the clip. Then go to adjust and set the situation to 0. Also add a bit of contrast. Lastly go 🙂 to the colorful clip and trim theGAME to your liking. Now export the video.

source_meta.caption:
I’ve been getting a lot of questions about this trendy color switch effect🥤, so here’s the full step-by-step  breakdown 🧡

Save this tutorial and try it for your next creative video! 👇🏽

Tools: your Phone, Edits

Just try it out. It’s worth it!

Video Inspiration by: @korizza_ast 

#tutorial #creativity #effect

result_description: The whole scene is black & white until you tap a drink — on the tap, full color returns.

inputs.name: drink_clip
inputs.what_to_film: Lock focus on a drink, start filming, walk around / pass by and tap the drink, then walk away.

timing.cue: the moment you tap the drink

edit_steps.note: desaturate to black & white before the tap
trim the colorful clip to taste

result.description: B&W flips to full color on the tap.
success_criteria: Color returns exactly on the tap
Contrast keeps the B&W section punchy
